articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Prime Video follows Netflix and Disney by adding a TikTok-like ‘Clips’ feed in its app - TechCrunch
articles.description: The Clips feed aims to enable discovery by offering users a scrollable feed with short snippets of shows and movies.
articles.content:
Amazon is adding a short-form video feed to the Prime Video app called “Clips,” the company announced on Friday.
Rolling out first in the U.S., Clips will include… well, clips of shows on Prime Vide… [+1401 chars]

articles.title: Pentagon begins releasing new files on UFOs and says people can 'make up their own minds' - PBS
articles.description: A 2024 congressional report revealed hundreds of new UAP incidents but found no evidence that the U.S. government had ever confirmed a sighting of alien technology.
articles.content:
WASHINGTON (AP) The Pentagon has begun releasing new files on UFOs, saying members of the public can draw their own conclusions on "unidentified anomalous phenomena."
